title: Roasted Crunchy Ethiopian Cabbage Berbere Stew
description: A hearty, crunchy, and flavorful stew made with Hispi sweetheart cabbage, roasted to perfection and seasoned with berbere spice. Great for meal prep and kosher-friendly diets.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C) and place a salt block or cast-iron skillet on a rack to preheat.
Cut the cabbage into wedges, removing the core, and place them cut-side up on the preheated salt block.
Roast the cabbage in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender and slightly charred.
In a large pot, heat the olive oil over medium heat and sauté the sliced onions until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Add the Berbere spice blend to the pot and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes, vegetable broth, salt, and black pepper to the pot, stirring to combine.
Add the roasted cabbage to the pot and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the flavors have melded together.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
